Branch.title: Branch
Branch.description: Represents an operational branch within the DuesFlow system, enabling multi-branch management and reporting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Branch entity.

name.description: The official name of the branch.

address.description: The physical address of the branch.

contactPerson.description: The name of the primary contact person for this branch.

contactEmail.description: The email address of the primary contact person for this branch.

contactPhone.description: The phone number of the primary contact person for this branch.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the branch record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the branch record was last updated.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Manages profiles and default settings for suppliers, including contact information and credit periods.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.

name.description: The full name of the supplier.

contactPerson.description: The name of the primary contact person at the supplier.

contactEmail.description: The email address of the primary contact person at the supplier.

contactPhone.description: The phone number of the primary contact person at the supplier.

address.description: The physical address of the supplier.

defaultCreditDays.description: The default number of credit days offered by this supplier.

category.description: A category or type for the supplier (e.g., Raw Materials, Services).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the supplier record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the supplier record was last updated.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Stores details of each purchase invoice, including imported opening balances, for tracking payments and due dates.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

branchId.description: Reference to the Branch where this invoice was issued. (Relationship: Branch 1:N Invoice)

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier from whom this invoice was received. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N Invoice)

invoiceNumber.description: The unique invoice number provided by the supplier (e.g., from Tally).

invoiceDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued.

invoiceAmount.description: The total original amount of the invoice.

creditDays.description: The number of credit days applicable to this invoice.

dueDate.description: The calculated due date for this invoice (invoiceDate + creditDays).

remainingBalance.description: The current outstanding amount remaining to be paid for this invoice.

status.description: The current payment status of the invoice (e.g., 'Pending', 'Partially Paid', 'Paid', 'Overdue').

isOpeningBalance.description: Indicates if this invoice represents an initial opening balance entry.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice data was first uploaded into the system.

uploadedByUserId.description: Reference to the user ID (from external auth system) who uploaded this invoice.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records individual payments made and how they are allocated across one or more invoices.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

paymentDate.description: The date on which the payment was made.

amountPaid.description: The total amount of this single payment.

paymentMethod.description: The method used for the payment (e.g., 'Bank Transfer', 'Cheque').

referenceNumber.description: A transaction reference number or cheque number for the payment.

paidByUserId.description: Reference to the user ID (from external auth system) who recorded this payment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

invoiceAllocations.description: An array detailing how this payment amount was distributed among different invoices. (Relationship: Payment 1:N InvoiceAllocation)

InvoiceAllocation.title: InvoiceAllocation
InvoiceAllocation.description: Represents a specific portion of a payment applied to a single invoice, crucial for partial payment tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvoiceAllocation entity.

paymentId.description: Reference to the Payment entity this allocation belongs to. (Relationship: Payment 1:N InvoiceAllocation)

invoiceId.description: Reference to the Invoice entity this payment portion was applied to. (Relationship: Invoice 1:N InvoiceAllocation)

amountApplied.description: The specific amount from the payment that was applied to this invoice.

allocatedAt.description: Timestamp when this allocation was recorded.

UserSettings.title: UserSettings
UserSettings.description: Stores personalized user preferences such as preferred currency and display settings.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when settings were last updated.

definition.description: Top-level collection for managing operational branch profiles.
Top-level collection for managing supplier profiles.
Central collection for all purchase invoices.
Private collection for user preferences and settings.

firestore.reasoning: Standard Firestore mapping for financial and administrative entities.
